title: pecute Professional Dog Nail Clippers + Nail File 2 in 1 Set, Sharp Stainless Steel Pet Claw Trimmers with Safety Guards for Medium to Large Dogs
features: 【Easy and Safe Cut】High quality stainless steel dog and cat nail clippers. Pet Nail Cutter will give you a powerful and durable cutting experience, clean cut. The strong elastic spring can help you save energy and better control your strength when cutting your nails.

【Safety Guarantee】The dog cat nail cutter provides safety protection (there is a small removable plate behind the blades), to ensure that you do not cut too far and risk injury to pets. Besides, Pecute cutter claws have a safety lock function, which allows locking the blades in the closed position.

【Nail File Included】A nail file is a gift, can passive the paw of a dog or cat, which can better clean kittens or puppies, not produce burrs. Suitable for professional cleaning of beauty in pet stores and daily use at home.

【Comfortable Handle】Ergonomic handles and rubber surfaces provide a comfortable non-slip grip, allowing you to keep control while cutting. You're no longer have the mark of scissors on your fingers, start cutting your dog's nails cleanly, evenly, and quickly.

【100% Guarantee】 Professional Pecute Nail Scissors is for medium and large dogs. We provide our customers with high-quality products. If you have any questions, please inform our customer service team, we are friendly and responsive, we will replace it or refund you in full.
description: Product Description Pecute Dog Nail Clipper Trimming your dog’s nails is an important task for every pet owner, as it will help to keep your canine companion happy and healthy. Aside from cosmetic reasons, trimming or filing dog nails is essential to prevent overgrown nails and to decrease injury. Pecute dog nail clippers will make this task much easier for both you and your dog Product Structure The trimmers feature ergonomic non-slip handles, a stainless steel blade, and a safety spacer. The blades are trusty old stainless steel. This means this set will last you a long time if well cared for. After using,remember lock the safety lock.It can avoid the blade hurt your baby. It also comes with a nail file，which can smooth sharp corner. The front end of Pecute pet nail clippers is stainless steel, which is sharp and durable. Safety baffles are designed according to the length of your pet's nails to prevent excessive trimming. The hand safety lock keeps the nail clippers off when not in use, and the button can be used. Portable nail file, emery material, smoother and more curved, not easy to scratch the owner. The file handle has a non-slip design, which can increase friction to prevent fingers from slipping. High-quality soft rubber handle with anti-slip groove design for improved trimming experience. How to Trim a Dog’s Nails by Yourself: 1.Determine the cutting line: Be extra careful when deciding where to cut, as dogs' nails are blood-supplied. Please refer to the picture for the trim position. 2.Clip your dog's nails: Trim by taking small steps at a time, and use rewards to keep your dog comfortable if needed. If there’s no blood at the end of the whole process and your dog behaves like nothing has happened, you’ve done everything right! 3.Smooth sharp corners: Smooth trimmed nails with a nail file
